ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_text" TEXT /* Text of the keyword */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign associated with the keyword */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category identifier for grouping keywords */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the keyword (e.g., active, paused, deleted) */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Bid amount for the keyword */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Match type of the keyword (e.g., exact, phrase, broad) */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score assigned by the advertising platform */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, conversions) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the campaign */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the campaign */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the keyword */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the keyword */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate of the keyword */,
  "rank" REAL /* Ranking position of the keyword */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the keyword performance */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions generated by the keyword */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the keyword */,
  "average_cpc" REAL /* Average cost per click */,
  "average_position" REAL /* Average position of the keyword */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* External platform where the performance data is sourced from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_performance_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertising platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising platform (e.g., Google Ads) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the platform's data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the platform integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data synchronization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the platform integration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the platform integration */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the platform integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_platforms_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_platforms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertising platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time of the last data synchronization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the integration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the integration */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_integrations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_integrations_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES ad_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_integrations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_integrations_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "a_b_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A/B test */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword being tested */,
  "variant_a_performance" REAL /* Performance metrics for variant A */,
  "variant_b_performance" REAL /* Performance metrics for variant B */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the A/B test (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the A/B test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the A/B test */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the A/B test */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the A/B test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_a_b_tests_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_a_b_tests_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_a_b_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
